mapper.select: insert into answer_feedback_audits ( feedback_id, action, previous_status, next_status, comment, operated_by, operated_at, metadata_json ) values ( #{record.feedbackId}, #{record.action}, #{record.previousStatus}, #{record.nextStatus}, #{record.comment}, #{record.operatedBy}, #{record.operatedAt}, #{record.metadataJson,typeHandler=com.xbk.lattice.infra.persistence.mybatis.PostgresJsonbTypeHandler} ) returning id

select id, feedback_id, action, previous_status, next_status, comment, operated_by, operated_at, metadata_json::text as metadata_json from answer_feedback_audits where feedback_id = #{feedbackId} order by operated_at desc, id desc
